---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new page, section, or functionality for the WAF++ website
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want to add or change? -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you have in mind. Feel free to be rough — wireframes, text outlines, or bullet points all work. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you consider a different approach? Why did you prefer this one? -->

## Scope

<!-- Is this a new page, a change to an existing page, a new component, navigation change, or something else? -->

- [ ] New page (EN + DE)
- [ ] Change to existing page
- [ ] Navigation / footer change
- [ ] New reusable component / include
- [ ] Data / content update only
- [ ] Other: …

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references, examples from other sites, related issues or RFCs -->
